creator: exploringlondon
caption:
Here are some things to do and see at least once in London!

1. Waterstones Piccadilly, the largest bookshop in London!

2. Afternoon tea at @the_lanesborough, one of my favourite places for afternoon tea in London and right now they have a Bridgerton themed tea!

3. Crossrail Place Roof Garden, a free rooftop garden with an array of exotic plants

4. Lift 109 @thechimneylift at Battersea Power Station for a unique view of London from the sky!

5. Woolwich Town Hall, a stunning and historic building that’s free to visit!

6. Tower Bridge Glass Walkway, for a unique view over the Thames and there’s a fascinating exhibition before and after the walkway too!

7. The Tate Modern @tate, one of the largest museums of modern and contemporary art, free to visit, with some ticketed exhibitions 

8. Mundo Pixar @mundopixarlondon, the world’s largest Pixar exhibition which is so fun to walk around and get transported to your favourite movies!

Share this with someone who would love this ❤️

#thingstodoinlondon #londonguide #londonlife
